hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; [ ! -f .claude/stacks.json ] && exit 0; STACK_PATH=$(jq -r --arg f "$FILE" '.stacks[] | select($f | startswith(.path + "/")) | .path' .claude/stacks.json 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -z "$STACK_PATH" ] && exit 0; REL=${FILE#$STACK_PATH/}; if [[ "$FILE" == *.kt ]] && [ -f "$STACK_PATH/gradlew" ]; then echo "[Harness] Kotlin 변경 감지 ($STACK_PATH) → ktlint"; (cd "$STACK_PATH" && ./gradlew ktlintCheck --daemon -q 2>&1 | tail -20); elif ([[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]) && [ -f "$STACK_PATH/package.json" ]; then echo "[Harness] TS 변경 감지 ($STACK_PATH) → ESLint"; (cd "$STACK_PATH" && npx eslint "$REL" --max-warnings 0 2>&1 | tail -20); elif [[ "$FILE" == *.dart ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *.g.dart ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *.freezed.dart ]] && command -v dart &>/dev/null; then echo "[Harness] Dart 변경 감지 ($STACK_PATH) → dart analyze"; (cd "$STACK_PATH" && dart analyze "$REL" 2>&1 | tail -20); elif [[ "$FILE" == *.go ]] && [ -f "$STACK_PATH/go.mod" ]; then echo "[Harness] Go 변경 감지 ($STACK_PATH) → gofmt+vet"; (cd "$STACK_PATH" && gofmt -l "$REL" 2>&1 && go vet ./... 2>&1 | tail -20); fi

[ ! -f .claude/stacks.json ] && exit 0; echo "[Harness] 작업 완료 → 활성 스택 테스트 실행"; jq -c '.stacks[]' .claude/stacks.json 2>/dev/null | while read -r s; do P=$(echo "$s" | jq -r '.path'); T=$(echo "$s" | jq -r '.type'); [ ! -d "$P" ] && continue; echo "  → [$P] ($T)"; case "$T" in kotlin*) (cd "$P" && [ -f ./gradlew ] && ./gradlew test --daemon -q 2>&1 | tail -15) ;; go*) (cd "$P" && [ -f go.mod ] && go test ./... 2>&1 | tail -15) ;; nextjs*) (cd "$P" && [ -f package.json ] && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10 && npx jest --passWithNoTests 2>&1 | tail -15) ;; flutter) (cd "$P" && [ -f pubspec.yaml ] && command -v flutter &>/dev/null && flutter test 2>&1 | tail -15) ;; esac; done
